note: Cognitive-style categories. Each is a trait the social-media algorithm ALREADY farms; the game meets that same circuit but delivers the payoff without the infinite trap — the wean. `id` is the internal trait key (Manuel's terms); `label` is the tasteful public-facing chip name (open decision — flip to raw terms if preferred). 20 games designed per category.

categories.label: Reflexes
categories.trait: fast-twitch reaction; the brain that thrives on split-second response
categories.algo_hook: fed rapid-cut hype edits and jump-scare bait tuned to their trigger speed
categories.wean: give them the pure reaction hit (react-or-die, dodge, catch, F1 starts) in a bounded 60s burst that ENDS, instead of an infinite reflex-baiting feed

categories.label: Order & Symmetry
categories.trait: the 'not-quite-right' pull; symmetry, alignment, completion, restoring order
categories.algo_hook: fed oddly-satisfying, restock, power-wash, and cleaning loops that scratch the order-itch endlessly
categories.wean: let them ACTUALLY finish it — align, sort, snap-to-grid, close the loop — and the satisfaction resolves instead of scrolling forever

categories.label: Patterns & Systems
categories.trait: systemizing brain; pattern recognition, rule-discovery, predictable sensory input, routine mastery
categories.algo_hook: fed deep-dive niche rabbit-holes and hyper-specific loops that reward pattern-hunting without end
categories.wean: a self-contained system to master — discover the rule, complete the pattern, predictable sensory feedback, a routine with a clear finish line

categories.label: Novelty
categories.trait: novelty-craving, quick-dopamine brain that can't sustain a long loop
categories.algo_hook: the FYP is BUILT for them — infinite novelty, each swipe a fresh hit, focus fragmented on purpose
categories.wean: ultra-short self-contained micro-games with a real ending — the novelty hit, then a stop, not an endless swipe

categories.label: Calm Control
categories.trait: seeks control and predictability to self-soothe; comforted by knowing what comes next
categories.algo_hook: doomscroll as a coping mechanism — chasing reassurance in an unpredictable feed that keeps the nervous system activated
categories.wean: a fully controllable, no-fail, predictable space that settles the nervous system — the soothe without the spike

categories.label: Wind-Down
categories.trait: late-night mind that won't power down; the 2am scroller
categories.algo_hook: autoplay + infinite feed engineered to keep them awake past every 'one more'
categories.wean: a game that DIMS and slows toward an ending — designed to hand them off to sleep, not to hold them

categories.label: Mastery
categories.trait: precision-driven, self-improvement loop; chasing the personal best
categories.algo_hook: fed skill-tutorial and 'you're doing it wrong' rabbit-holes that never let them feel finished
categories.wean: a high-skill-ceiling precision game with a clean PB to beat — masterable, measurable, and yours

categories.label: Completionist
categories.trait: set-completion drive; gotta-collect-them-all, fill the shelf
categories.algo_hook: fed hauls, unboxings, and gacha bait that dangle incomplete sets to keep them buying/scrolling
categories.wean: a finite, free, completable collection — the satisfaction of a full set with no money and no infinite dangle

categories.label: Rank Chasers
categories.algo_hook: fed ratio wars, follower counts, and leaderboard clout that weaponize social comparison
categories.wean: a clean head-to-head via dare-links — beat a friend's real score, then it's settled, no permanent ladder to obsess over

categories.label: Sensory / ASMR
categories.trait: craves tactile and audio satisfaction; the squish, the pop, the crunch
categories.algo_hook: fed ASMR, slime, kinetic-sand, and pop-it loops that deliver sensory hits on an endless scroll
categories.wean: generative tactile toys with rich synthesized sound — pop, stretch, ripple — a self-contained sensory session

categories.label: Rhythm & Flow
categories.trait: flow-state seeker; locks into music and repetition
categories.algo_hook: fed audio memes and looping sounds that hijack the flow-craving into endless replay
categories.wean: a tight rhythm/timing game that delivers real flow in a bounded track that ends on a beat

categories.label: Memory & Recall
categories.algo_hook: fed nostalgia bait and 'only 90s kids remember' hooks that farm the recall reflex
categories.wean: a real memory test — sequence, match, recall — that exercises the faculty instead of merely baiting it

categories.label: Curiosity Gap
categories.trait: needs to know what's next; can't leave a loop open
categories.algo_hook: the entire FYP runs on cliffhangers and 'wait for it' — the open loop that only the next swipe closes
categories.wean: a game built ON the curiosity gap that actually CLOSES it — reveal, unlock, reach the end, mystery solved

categories.label: Face Control
categories.trait: the face-filter / reaction-challenge instinct — pulling funny faces for the camera
categories.algo_hook: TikTok/IG farm funny-face, filter, and reaction content endlessly; the front camera is always watching
categories.wean: a game you play WITH your face (mouth, eyebrows, head tilt) that RECORDS the chaos into one shareable clip — the funny-face content makes itself, then ends
